labels.directions: Apply a small amount to clean face and neck, morning and evening. Gently massage until fully absorbed. For best results, use daily.
labels.warnings: For external use only. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Perform a patch test before full application. Avoid direct contact with eyes; if contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.
labels.company_line: Veridian Dew, 7 Rue de la Rosée, Paris, France
labels.batch_note: LOT: [Printer to add batch code] EXP: [Printer to add best-before date]

labels.directions: After cleansing, apply 2-3 drops to face and neck. Gently pat into skin until absorbed. Follow with moisturizer for optimal hydration.
labels.warnings: For external use only. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Perform a patch test before full application. Avoid direct contact with eyes; if contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.
labels.company_line: Veridian Dew, 1200 Emerald Way, Los Angeles, CA, USA
labels.batch_note: LOT: [Printer to add batch code] EXP: [Printer to add best-before date]
